title: Is Gelatin in Medicinal Tablets Permissible?
stanceSummary: In this answer, Yasir Qadhi addresses "Is Gelatin in Medicinal Tablets Permissible" and outlines the ruling with its main conditions and limits. He emphasizes following foundational Quranic and Sunnah principles while accounting for context, scholarly nuance, and practical realities for Muslims today.
